sentences.target: Diese Schuhe sind geeignet für Regenwetter.

translations.de: Diese Schuhe sind geeignet für Regenwetter.
translations.en: These shoes are suitable for rainy weather.
translations.es: Estos zapatos son adecuados para la lluvia.
translations.fr: Ces chaussures sont adaptées à la pluie.
translations.it: Queste scarpe sono adatte alla pioggia.
translations.ko: 이 신발은 비 오는 날에 신기 좋아요.
translations.ru: Эта обувь подходит для дождливой погоды.
translations.pt: Estes sapatos são adequados para dias de chuva.
translations.tr: Bu ayakkabılar yağmurlu havalar için uygun.
translations.vi: Đôi giày này hợp cho ngày mưa.
translations.nl: Deze schoenen zijn geschikt voor regenachtig weer.
translations.uk: Це взуття підходить для дощової погоди.
translations.hu: Ezek a cipők alkalmasak esős időre.
translations.hi: ये जूते बारिश के दिनों के लिए ठीक हैं.
translations.pl: Te buty nadają się na deszczową pogodę.
translations.el: Αυτά τα παπούτσια είναι κατάλληλα για βροχερό καιρό.
translations.id: Sepatu ini cocok untuk cuaca hujan.
translations.sv: De här skorna passar för regnigt väder.
translations.ro: Acești pantofi sunt potriviți pentru vreme ploioasă.
translations.cs: Tyto boty jsou vhodné do deštivého počasí.
translations.da: Disse sko er velegnede til regnvejr.
translations.ja: この靴は雨の日に向いています。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner; nominative plural; modifies 'Schuhe' and agrees in number/case.
Plural noun; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite copula (present, 3rd person plural); links the subject to the predicative 'geeignet'.
Predicative adjective; complement of the copula 'sind'; expresses suitability.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a PP specifying applicability.
Neuter singular noun; accusative as object of 'für'; compound denoting rainy weather.

sentences.target: Für Kinder ist das Spiel geeignet.

translations.de: Für Kinder ist das Spiel geeignet.
translations.en: The game is suitable for children.
translations.es: El juego es adecuado para niños.
translations.it: Il gioco è adatto ai bambini.
translations.pt: O jogo é adequado para crianças.
translations.vi: Trò chơi này phù hợp với trẻ em.
translations.nl: Het spel is geschikt voor kinderen.
translations.hi: यह खेल बच्चों के लिए उपयुक्त है.
translations.pl: Ta gra jest odpowiednia dla dzieci.
translations.el: Το παιχνίδι είναι κατάλληλο για παιδιά.
translations.ja: このゲームは子ども向けです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition selecting accusative; fronted PP for topicalization.
Plural noun; accusative as object of 'für'.
Finite copula (present, 3rd person singular); links subject 'das Spiel' to predicative 'geeignet'.
Definite article; nominative neuter singular; modifies 'Spiel'.
Neuter singular noun; nominative subject of the copular clause.
Predicative adjective; complement of 'ist'; expresses suitability.

sentences.target: Das Sofa scheint geeignet für die Wohnung.
sentences.reading: /das ˈzoːfa ʃaɪ̯nt ɡəˈaɪ̯ɡnət fyːɐ̯ diː ˈvoːnʊŋ/

translations.de: Das Sofa scheint geeignet für die Wohnung.
translations.ipa: /das ˈzoːfa ʃaɪ̯nt ɡəˈaɪ̯ɡnət fyːɐ̯ diː ˈvoːnʊŋ/
translations.en: The sofa seems suitable for the apartment.
translations.es: El sofá parece adecuado para el apartamento.
translations.fr: Le canapé semble convenir à l'appartement.
translations.ko: 그 소파는 집에 잘 어울릴 것 같아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这张沙发看起来很适合这套公寓。
translations.yue: 呢張梳化睇落好啱呢個單位。
translations.ru: Кажется, этот диван подходит для квартиры.
translations.pt: O sofá parece adequado para o apartamento.
translations.tr: Kanepe daire için uygun gibi görünüyor.
translations.vi: Chiếc ghế sofa có vẻ hợp với căn hộ.
translations.nl: De bank lijkt geschikt voor het appartement.
translations.uk: Здається, цей диван підходить для квартири.
translations.hu: Úgy tűnik, a kanapé illik a lakásba.
translations.hi: सोफ़ा अपार्टमेंट के लिए ठीक लगता है.
translations.pl: Kanapa wydaje się odpowiednia do mieszkania.
translations.el: Ο καναπές φαίνεται κατάλληλος για το διαμέρισμα.
translations.nb: Sofaen ser ut til å passe i leiligheten.
translations.id: Sofa itu terlihat cocok untuk apartemen.
translations.cs: Gauč se zdá vhodný do bytu.
translations.da: Sofaen ser ud til at passe i lejligheden.
translations.ja: そのソファは部屋に合いそうです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular; modifies 'Sofa'.
Neuter singular noun; nominative; head of the subject NP.
Finite lexical verb (present, 3rd person singular); takes predicative complement 'geeignet' and a PP.
Predicative adjective; complement to 'scheint'; expresses perceived suitability.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces PP indicating target context.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular; modifies 'Wohnung' as object of 'für'.
Feminine singular noun; accusative; object of the preposition 'für'.

translations.en: This is suitable as a gift.
translations.vi: Cái này hợp để làm quà.
translations.hi: यह तोहफ़ा देने के लिए ठीक है.
translations.ja: これはプレゼントにぴったりです。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun; neuter singular; subject of the clause.
Finite copula (present, 3rd person singular); links the subject to the predicative 'geeignet'.
Predicative adjective; complement of 'ist'; expresses suitability.
Preposition introducing a role/class; forms a PP complement to 'geeignet'.
Neuter singular noun; complement of 'als' indicating the role (as a gift).
